steps.t: Akhamâl has told you to check the north-western entrance of the Dahâl Huliz for Belhax.
You have found a leaking crate at the Dahâl Huliz's north-western entrance. Belhax is nowhere in sight. You should examine it and the puddle it's leav…
You have found Belhax's wine delivery, but not him. A trail of wine droplets leads you further around the Tor-gardens pool. You should follow it.
You have found Belhax's wine delivery, but not him. A trail of wine droplets leads you further around the Tor-gardens pool. You should follow it.
You have found Belhax at the gazebo in the center of the Tor-gardens pool! You should try to talk to him.
You've found Belhax safe and sound. You should tell Akhamâl back at the Dahâl Huliz.
